Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Ill examine the event log: Case 1001: activities in correct order: Register Order Sales, Perform Credit Check Finance, Validate Stock Warehouse, Confirm Shipment Logistics, Ship Goods Logistics, Issue Invoice Finance, Receive Payment Finance. Fine.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002: activities: Register Order 820, Confirm Shipment 825 early before credit check and stock validation, Ship Goods 840, Perform Credit Check 910, Validate Stock 915, Issue Invoice 930, Receive Payment 221000. Anomalies: Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods happen before credit check and stock validation.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003: activities: Register Order 845, Perform Credit Check 900, Ship Goods 910, Issue Invoice 930, Confirm Shipment 945 late, Receive Payment 221100. Anomalies: Ship Goods before Confirm Shipment. Validate Stock is missing entirely.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004: activities: Register Order 900, Receive Payment 905, Issue Invoice 920, Confirm Shipment 925, Ship Goods 950. Missing: Perform Credit Check, Validate Stock. Anomalies: Payment received before invoice issued.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall anomalies across cases: out-of-order execution shipment before credit check, payment before invoice, etc., missing activities credit check, stock validation, and attempted_early and late_confirmation flags.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses: Deliberate policy violation maverick behavior resources bypassing checks to expedite shipment. System error or UI issues allowing actions before dependencies. Training issues where employees not following correct sequence. Fraud case 1004 payment before invoice might be fraudulent pre-collection.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To investigate propose SQL queries: 1. Detect cases where activity order deviates compare timestamps of specific activities per case. 2. Find cases missing mandatory activities. 3. Look for patterns with attempted_early or late_confirmation in additional_info and correlate with resource role. Specific queries like for Ship Goods before Perform Credit Check using MIN timestamp comparison.
